parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Mandate UUID (also the value sent to Juspay as order_id)

200.description: All mandate orders for the user (most-recent first)

AccountDetails.description:
Tagged JSONB blob persisted into `accounts.account_details`. Mirrors
`accounts.account_type` — types that carry extra metadata (e.g.
`SAVINGS` → IFSC) embed it; the rest are unit variants. Bank account
numbers / PBA UUIDs live in `accounts.external_account_id`.

AccountType.description: Type of financial or health account.

AddressDetails.description: Structured address details for user profiles and insurance documents.

country.description: Two-letter country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Defaults to "IN".

AnsweredQuestion.description:
A question paired with the user's boolean answer.

Used both as:
- the request-side payload at policy create / preview time, and
- the persisted snapshot on `insurance_policies.questionnaire`.

`question` text must match the benefit's wording exactly — server rejects
stale or mismatched questionnaires.

BankDetails.description: Origin-bank details required to open a purpose-bound account at PBA.

account_number.description: Origin bank account number. Sensitive — never logged in plaintext.

ifsc_code.description: IFSC code of the origin bank branch (11 chars, e.g. "HDFC0000001").

BenefitType.description: Kind of benefit offered by a provider.

Currency.description:
ISO 4217 three-letter currency codes.

Currently INR only; add variants as the product expands.

DependantNominee.description: A nominee who is an existing dependant in the system.

Duration.description:
A length of time expressed in a single unit.

Wire format: externally-tagged union — single-key object whose key is the
unit name (`days` / `months` / `years`) and whose value is the integer
count. Example: `{"months": 12}` or `{"years": 1}`.

ExternalNominee.description: A nominee who is an external person not registered as a dependant.

GetBalanceResponse.description:
Response shape mirrors PBA's `GetBalanceOutput` byte-for-byte (snake_case
field names, no extra wrapping). All monetary amounts are in the smallest
currency unit (e.g. paise for INR).

InsurancePolicyMetadata.description: Auxiliary metadata for an insurance policy.

provider_metadata.description:
Free-form provider data captured during admin bulk update
(e.g. from insurance provider reconciliation CSVs). Any columns not
mapped to the structured update fields are stored here verbatim.

MandateFrequency.description: Debit frequency for a mandate. Mirrors Juspay's wire enum.

MandateStatus.description: Internal mandate lifecycle status — coarse-grained view derived from the raw Juspay status string.

allOf.description: The nominee is an existing dependant.

oneOf.description: The nominee is an existing dependant.

allOf.description: The nominee is an external person not registered as a dependant.

oneOf.description: The nominee is an external person not registered as a dependant.

NomineeDetails.description:
Nominee for an insurance policy — either a registered dependant or an
external person whose details are captured inline.

Question.description: A single yes/no question definition (benefit side, no answer attached).

Relationship.description: Relationship of a dependant to the primary user.

Salutation.description: Title or honorific for a person.

TimeRange.description:
A half-open time range, with a mandatory start and an optional end.
Designed to be embedded in list/filter query params via `#[serde(flatten)]`.

`Deserialize` runs [`TimeRange::validate`] as part of deserialization, so
callers never receive a [`TimeRange`] that violates `start_time <= end_time`.

end_time.description: Inclusive end time; defaults to "now" when omitted.

TransactionSummary.description:
Mirrors PBA's `TransactionSummary` field-for-field. Open-ended string
fields (`type`, `status`, `pool`, `direction`) are passed through as
strings rather than re-typing as enums — keeps the wire format identical
even if PBA adds a new variant we haven't seen yet.

Bearer.description: JWT access token. Obtain from /auth/otp/verify endpoint.
